nasb.text: to prepare timber in abundance for me, for the house which I am about to build will be great and wonderful.

esv.text: to prepare timber for me in abundance, for the house I am to build will be great and wonderful.

cnv.text: 給我預備大量的木材，因為我要建造的那殿宇，將會十分宏偉。

ccb.text: 我要建的殿宇非常宏伟，所以需要的木料非常多。
